<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now let me analyze the situation:

1. **Working API call** (from `api-AzureOpenAI.http`):
   - URL: `http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2/chat/completions`
   - Header: `api-key: d4922a22-488f-07a6-dc68-00b7de42ce67`
   - Model: `gpt-5.2`
   - This works and returns a 200 response

2. **Current config** (from `openclaw.json`):
   - `baseUrl`: `http://10.11.197.97/`
   - `api`: `openai-completions`
   - `authHeader`: `false`
   - Custom headers with `api-key`

The webui is returning 404, which suggests the configuration isn't constructing the full endpoint path correctly. The working endpoint follows Azure's pattern of `{baseUrl}/openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/chat/completions`, but the current config seems to be missing how it maps the deployment ID and constructs the complete URL path.

I need to check how the azure provider and openai-completions API type actually build URLs in this codebase to understand the mismatch.</details></think>

---

[],\\\\\\\\n          context.systemPrompt,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        const ollamaTools = extractOllamaTools(context.tools);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // Ollama defaults to num_ctx=4096 which is too small for large\\\\\\\\n        // system prompts + many tool definitions. See [Hugging Face (Inference)](/providers/huggingface).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Providers via &#96;models.providers&#96; (custom/base URL)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nUse &#96;models.providers&#96; (or &#96;models.json&#96;) to add **custom** providers or\\\\\\\\nOpenAI/Anthropic‑compatible proxies.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Moonshot AI (Kimi)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nMoonshot uses OpenAI-compatible endpoints, so configure it as a custom provider:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Provider: &#96;moonshot&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Auth: &#96;MOONSHOT_API_KEY&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Example model: &#96;moonshot/kimi-k2.5&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nKimi K2 model IDs:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n{/_moonshot-kimi-k2-model-refs:start_/ &amp;&amp; null}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json5\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  agents: {\\\\\\\\n    defaults: { model: { primary: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"moonshot/kimi-k2.5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" } },\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  models: {\\\\\\\\n    mode: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"merge\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    providers: {\\\\\\\\n      moonshot: {\\\\\\\\n        baseUrl: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://api.moonshot.ai/v1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        apiKey: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"${MOONSHOT_API_KEY}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        api: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openai-completions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        models: [{ id: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"kimi-k2.5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", name: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Kimi K2.5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }],\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Kimi Coding\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nKimi Coding uses Moonshot AI's Anthropic-compatible endpoint:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Provider: &#96;kimi-coding&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Auth: &#96;KIMI_API_KEY&#96;\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Other built-in providers\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":146},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":147},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- OpenRouter: &#96;openrouter&#96;  - 集成需要 OpenAI Chat Completions 的工具\\\\\\\\nsummary: 从 Gateway 网关暴露 OpenAI 兼容的 /v1/chat/completions HTTP 端点\\\\\\\\ntitle: OpenAI Chat Completions\\\\\\\\nx-i18n:\\\\\\\\n  generated_at: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"2026-02-03T07:48:15Z\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  model: claude-opus-4-5\\\\\\\\n  provider: pi\\\\\\\\n  source_hash: 6f935777f489bff925a3bf18b1e4b7493f83ae7b1e581890092e5779af59b732\\\\\\\\n  source_path: gateway/openai-http-api.md\\\\\\\\n  workflow: 15\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# OpenAI Chat Completions（HTTP）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nOpenClaw 的 Gateway 网关可以提供一个小型的 OpenAI 兼容 Chat Completions 端点。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n此端点**默认禁用**。请先在配置中启用它。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- &#96;POST /v1/chat/completions&#96;\\\\\\\\n- 与 Gateway 网关相同的端口（WS + HTTP 多路复用）：&#96;http://&lt;gateway-host&gt;:&lt;port&gt;/v1/chat/completions&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n底层实现中，请求作为普通的 Gateway 网关智能体运行执行（与 &#96;openclaw agent&#96; 相同的代码路径），因此路由/权限/配置与你的 Gateway 网关一致。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 认证\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n使用 Gateway 网关认证配置。发送 bearer 令牌：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- &#96;Authorization: Bearer &lt;token&gt;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n注意事项：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- 当 &#96;gateway.auth.mode=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; 时，使用 &#96;gateway.auth.token&#96;（或 &#96;OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN&#96;）。\\\\\\\\n- 当 &#96;gateway.auth.mode=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"password\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; 时，使用 &#96;gateway.auth.password&#96;（或 &#96;OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PASSWORD&#96;）。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 选择智能体\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n无需自定义头：在 OpenAI &#96;model&#96; 字段中编码智能体 ID：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- &#96;model: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openclaw:&lt;agentId&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;（例如：&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openclaw:main\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;、&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openclaw:beta\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;）\\\\\\\\n- &#96;model: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent:&lt;agentId&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;（别名）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n或通过头指定特定的 OpenClaw 智能体：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- &#96;x-openclaw-agent-id: &lt;agentId&gt;&#96;（默认：&#96;main&#96;）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n高级选项：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- &#96;x-openclaw-session-key: &lt;sessionKey&gt;&#96; 完全控制会话路由。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 启用端点\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n将 &#96;gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions.enabled&#96; 设置为 &#96;true&#96;：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json5\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  gateway: {\\\\\\\\n    http: {\\\\\\\\n      endpoints: {\\\\\\\\n        chatCompletions: { enabled: true },\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 禁用端点\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n将 &#96;gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions.enabled&#96; 设置为 &#96;false&#96;：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json5\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  gateway: {\\\\\\\\n    http: {\\\\\\\\n AI Foundry or Azure OpenAI.\\\\\\\\n * Matches both:\\\\\\\\n * - https://*.services.ai.azure.com (Azure AI Foundry)\\\\\\\\n * - https://*.openai.azure.com (classic Azure OpenAI)\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction isAzureUrl(baseUrl: string): boolean {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const url = new URL(baseUrl);\\\\\\\\n    const host = url.hostname.toLowerCase();\\\\\\\\n    return host.endsWith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".services.ai.azure.com\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") || host.endsWith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".openai.azure.com\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Transforms an Azure AI Foundry/OpenAI URL to include the deployment path.\\\\\\\\n * Azure requires: https://host/openai/deployments/&lt;model-id&gt;/chat/completions?api-version=2024-xx-xx-preview\\\\\\\\n * But we can't add query params here, so we just add the path prefix.\\\\\\\\n * The api-version will be handled by the Azure OpenAI client or as a query param.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Example:\\\\\\\\n *   https://my-resource.services.ai.azure.com + gpt-5-nano\\\\\\\\n *   =&gt; https://my-resource.services.ai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-5-nano\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nfunction transformAzureUrl(baseUrl: string, modelId: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const normalizedUrl = baseUrl.endsWith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") ? baseUrl.slice(0, -1) : baseUrl;\\\\\\\\n  // Check if the URL already includes the deployment path\\\\\\\\n  if (normalizedUrl.includes(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/openai/deployments/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")) {\\\\\\\\n    return normalizedUrl;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"../model-forward-compat.js\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { normalizeProviderId } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"../model-selection.js\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { discoverAuthStorage, string;\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\ntype InlineProviderConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  baseUrl?: string;\\\\\\\\n  api?: ModelDefinitionConfig[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"api\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"];\\\\\\\\n  models?: ModelDefinitionConfig[];\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { buildModelAliasLines };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function buildInlineProviderModels(\\\\\\\\n  providers: Record&lt;string, InlineProviderConfig&gt;,\\\\\\\\n): InlineModelEntry[] {\\\\\\\\n  return Object.entries(providers).flatMap(([providerId, entry]) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const trimmed = providerId.trim();\\\\\\\\n    if (!trimmed) {\\\\\\\\n      return [];\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return (entry?.models ?? []).map((model) =&gt; ({\\\\\\\\n      ...model,\\\\\\\\n      provider: trimmed,\\\\\\\\n      baseUrl: entry?.baseUrl,\\\\\\\\n      api: model.api ?? entry?.api,\\\\\\\\n    }));\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function resolveModel(\\\\\\\\n  provider: string,\\\\\\\\n  modelId: string,\\\\\\\\n  agentDir?: string,\\\\\\\\n  cfg?: OpenClawConfig,\\\\\\\\n): {\\\\\\\\n  model?: Model&lt;Api&gt;;\\\\\\\\n  error?: string;\\\\\\\\n  authStorage: AuthStorage;\\\\\\\\n  modelRegistry: ModelRegistry;\\\\\\\\n} {\\\\\\\\n  const resolvedAgentDir = agentDir ?? resolveOpenClawAgentDir();\\\\\\\\n  const authStorage = discoverAuthStorage(resolvedAgentDir);\\\\\\\\n  const modelRegistry = discoverModels(authStorage, resolvedAgentDir);\\\\\\\\n  const model = modelRegistry.find(provider, modelId) as Model&lt;Api&gt; | null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!model) {\\\\\\\\n    const providers = cfg?.models?.providers ?? {};\\\\\\\\n    const inlineModels = buildInlineProviderModels(providers);\\\\\\\\n    const normalizedProvider = normalizeProviderId(provider);\\\\\\\\n    const inlineMatch = inlineModels.find(\\\\\\\\n      (entry) =&gt; normalizeProviderId(entry.provider) === normalizedProvider &amp;&amp; entry.id === modelId,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (inlineMatch) {\\\\\\\\n      const normalized = normalizeModelCompat(inlineMatch as Model&lt;Api&gt;);\\\\\\\\n      return {\\\\\\\\n        model: normalized,\\\\\\\\n        authStorage,\\\\\\\\n        modelRegistry,\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Forward-compat fallbacks must be checked BEFORE the generic providerCfg fallback.\\\\\\\\n    // Otherwise, configured providers can default to a generic API and break specific transports.\\\\\\\\n    const forwardCompat = resolveForwardCompatModel(provider, modelId, modelRegistry);\\\\\\\\n    if (forwardCompat) {\\\\\\\\n      return { model: forwardCompat, authStorage, modelRegistry };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // OpenRouter is a pass-through proxy — any model ID available on OpenRouter\\\\\\\\n    // should work without being pre-registered in the local catalog.\\\\\\\\n    if (normalizedProvider === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openrouter\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n      const fallbackModel: Model&lt;Api&gt; = normalizeModelCompat({\\\\\\\\n        id: modelId,\\\\\\\\n        name: modelId,\\\\\\\\n        api: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openai-completions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        provider,\\\\\\\\n        baseUrl: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        reasoning: false,\\\\\\\\n        input: [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\n        cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },\\\\\\\\n        contextWindow: DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS,\\\\\\\\n        // Align with OPENROUTER_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS in models-config.providers.ts\\\\\\\\n        maxTokens: 8192,\\\\\\\\n      } as Model&lt;Api&gt;);\\\\\\\\n      return { model: fallbackModel, authStorage, modelRegistry };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const providerCfg = providers[provider];\\\\\\\\n    if (providerCfg || modelId.startsWith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"mock-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")) {\\\\\\\\n      const configuredModel = providerCfg?.models?.find((candidate) =&gt; candidate.id === modelId);\\\\\\\\n      const fallbackModel: Model&lt;Api&gt; = normalizeModelCompat({\\\\\\\\n        id: modelId,\\\\\\\\n        name: modelId,\\\\\\\\n        api: providerCfg?.api ?? \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openai-responses\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        provider,\\\\\\\\n        baseUrl: providerCfg?.baseUrl,\\\\\\\\n        reasoning: configuredModel?.reasoning ?? false,\\\\\\\\n        input: [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\n        cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },\\\\\\\\n        contextWindow:\\\\\\\\n          configuredModel?.contextWindow ??\\\\\\\\n          providerCfg?.models?.[0]?.contextWindow ??\\\\\\\\n          DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS,\\\\\\\\n        maxTokens:\\\\\\\\n          configuredModel?.maxTokens ??\\\\\\\\n          providerCfg?.models?.[0]?.maxTokens ??\\\\\\\\n          DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS,\\\\\\\\n      } as Model&lt;Api&gt;);\\\\\\\\n      return { model: fallbackModel, authStorage, modelRegistry };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      error: buildUnknownModelError(provider, modelId),\\\\\\\\n      authStorage,\\\\\\\\n      modelRegistry,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return { model: normalizeModelCompat(model), authStorage, modelRegistry };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Build a more helpful error when the model is not found.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Local providers (ollama, vllm) need a dummy API key to be registered.\\\\\\\\n * Users often configure &#96;agents.defaults.model.primary: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ollama/…\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; but\\\\\\\\n * forget to set &#96;OLLAMA_API_KEY&#96;, resulting in a confusing \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Unknown model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n * error.  This detects known providers that require opt-in auth and adds\\\\\\\\n * a hint.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * See: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/17328\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nconst LOCAL_PROVIDER_HINTS: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {\\\\\\\\n  ollama:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Ollama requires authentication to be registered as a provider. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" +\\\\\\\\n    'Set OLLAMA_API_KEY=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ollama-local\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (any value works) or run \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openclaw configure\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". ' +\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"See: https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/ollama\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  vllm:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"vLLM requires authentication to be registered as a provider. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" +\\\\\\\\n    'Set VLLM_API_KEY (any value works) or run \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openclaw configure\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\". ' +\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"See: https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/vllm\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction buildUnknownModelError(provider: string, modelId: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const base = &#96;Unknown model: ${provider}/${modelId}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n  const hint = LOCAL_PROVIDER_HINTS[provider.toLowerCase()];\\\\\\\\n  return hint ? &#96;${base}. ${hint}&#96; : \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").replace(/^-+|-+$/g, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction buildEndpointIdFromUrl(baseUrl: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"custom\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"custom\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction resolveUniqueEndpointId(params: {\\\\\\\\n  requestedId: string;\\\\\\\\n  baseUrl: string;\\\\\\\\n  providers: Record&lt;string, ModelProviderConfig | undefined&gt;;\\\\\\\\n}) {\\\\\\\\n  const normalized = };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction resolveAliasError(params: {\\\\\\\\n  raw: string;\\\\\\\\n  cfg: OpenClawConfig;\\\\\\\\n  modelRef: string;\\\\\\\\n}): string | undefined {\\\\\\\\n  const ts\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"  models: {\\\\\\\\n    mode: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"merge\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", // merge (default) | replace\\\\\\\\n    providers: {\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"custom-proxy\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n        baseUrl: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"http://localhost:4000/v1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        apiKey: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"LITELLM_KEY\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        api: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"openai-completions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", // openai-completions | openai-responses | anthropic-messages | google-generative-ai\\\\\\\\n        models: [\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            id: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llama-3.1-8b\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            name: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Llama 3.1 8B\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            reasoning: false,\\\\\\\\n            input: [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\n            cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },\\\\\\\\n            contextWindow: 128000,\\\\\\\\n            maxTokens: 32000,\\\\\\\\n          },\\\\\\\\n        ],\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Use &#96;authHeader: true&#96; + &#96;headers&#96; for custom auth needs.\\\\\\\\n- Override agent config root with &#96;OPENCLAW_AGENT_DIR&#96; (or &#96;PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR&#96;).\\\\\\\\n- Merge precedence for matching provider IDs:\\\\\\\\n  - Non-empty agent &#96;models.json&#96; &#96;apiKey&#96;/&#96;baseUrl&#96; win.\\\\\\\\n  - Empty or missing agent &#96;apiKey&#96;/&#96;baseUrl&#96; fall back to &#96;models.providers&#96; in config.\\\\\\\\n  - Matching model &#96;contextWindow&#96;/&#96;maxTokens&#96; use the higher value between explicit config and implicit catalog values.\\\\\\\\n  - Use &#96;models.mode: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; when you want config to fully rewrite &#96;models.json&#96;.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Provider field details\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.mode&#96;: provider catalog behavior (&#96;merge&#96; or &#96;replace&#96;).\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers&#96;: custom provider map keyed by provider id.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers.*.api&#96;: request adapter (&#96;openai-completions&#96;, &#96;openai-responses&#96;, &#96;anthropic-messages&#96;, &#96;google-generative-ai&#96;, etc).\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers.*.apiKey&#96;: provider credential (prefer SecretRef/env substitution).\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers.*.auth&#96;: auth strategy (&#96;api-key&#96;, &#96;token&#96;, &#96;oauth&#96;, &#96;aws-sdk&#96;).\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers.*.injectNumCtxForOpenAICompat&#96;: for Ollama + &#96;openai-completions&#96;, inject &#96;options.num_ctx&#96; into requests (default: &#96;true&#96;).\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers.*.authHeader&#96;: force credential transport in the &#96;Authorization&#96; header when required.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers.*.baseUrl&#96;: upstream API base URL.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers.*.headers&#96;: extra static headers for proxy/tenant routing.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.providers.*.models&#96;: explicit provider model catalog entries.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.bedrockDiscovery&#96;: Bedrock auto-discovery settings root.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.bedrockDiscovery.enabled&#96;: turn discovery polling on/off.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.bedrockDiscovery.region&#96;: AWS region for discovery.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.bedrockDiscovery.providerFilter&#96;: optional provider-id filter for targeted discovery.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.bedrockDiscovery.refreshInterval&#96;: polling interval for discovery refresh.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.bedrockDiscovery.defaultContextWindow&#96;: fallback context window for discovered models.\\\\\\\\n- &#96;models.bedrockDiscovery.defaultMaxTokens&#96;: fallback max output tokens for discovered models.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Provider examples\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&lt;Accordion title=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Cerebras (GLM 4.6 / 4.7)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json5\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  env: { CEREBRAS_API_KEY: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sk-...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" },\\\\\\\\n function buildInlineProviderModels(\\\\\\\\n  providers: Record&lt;string, InlineProviderConfig&gt;,\\\\\\\\n): InlineModelEntry[] {\\\\\\\\n  return Object.entries(providers).flatMap(([providerId, entry]) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const trimmed = providerId.trim();\\\\\\\\n    if (!trimmed) {\\\\\\\\n      return [];\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return (entry?.models ?? []).map((model) =&gt; ({\\\\\\\\n      ...model,\\\\\\\\n      provider: trimmed,\\\\\\\\n      baseUrl: entry?.baseUrl,\\\\\\\\n      api: model.api ?? entry?.api,\\\\\\\\n    }));\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function resolveModel(\\\\\\\\n  provider: string,\\\\\\\\n  modelId: string,\\\\\\\\n  agentDir?: string,\\\\\\\\n  cfg?: OpenClawConfig,\\\\\\\\n): {\\\\\\\\n  model?: Model&lt;Api&gt;;\\\\\\\\n  error?: string;\\\\\\\\n  authStorage: AuthStorage;\\\\\\\\n  modelRegistry: ModelRegistry;\\\\\\\\n} {\\\\\\\\n  const resolvedAgentDir = agentDir ?? resolveOpenClawAgentDir();\\\\\\\\n  const authStorage = discoverAuthStorage(resolvedAgentDir);\\\\\\\\n  const modelRegistry = discoverModels(authStorage, resolvedAgentDir);\\\\\\\\n  const model = modelRegistry.find(provider, modelId) as Model&lt;Api&gt; | null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!model) {\\\\\\\\n    const providers = cfg?.models?.providers ?? {};\\\\\\\\n    const inlineModels = buildInlineProviderModels(providers);\\\\\\\\n    const normalizedProvider = normalizeProviderId(provider);\\\\\\\\n    const inlineMatch = inlineModels.find(\\\\\\\\n      (entry) =&gt; normalizeProviderId(entry.provider) === normalizedProvider &amp;&amp; entry.id === modelId,\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (inlineMatch) {\\\\\\\\n      const normalized = normalizeModelCompat(inlineMatch as Model&lt;Api&gt;);\\\\\\\\n      return {\\\\\\\\n        model: normalized,\\\\\\\\n        authStorage,\\\\\\\\n        modelRegistry,\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // Forward-compat fallbacks must be checked BEFORE the generic providerCfg fallback.\\\\\\\\n    // Otherwise, configured providers can default to a generic API and break specific transports.\\\\\\\\n    const forwardCompat = resolveForwardCompatModel(provider, modelId, modelRegistry);\\\\\\\\n    if (forwardCompat) {\\\\\\\\n      return { model: forwardCompat, authStorage, modelRegistry };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    // OpenRouter is a pass-through proxy — any model ID available on OpenRouter\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":156}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"d089d656-1aea-4bbe-a7a6-80aad8a51216\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"56abb721-0512-415c-93e2-c0b4c3f74afd\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-05T08:31:47.223Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescr I'm verifying whether pi-ai appends /v1/ or just /chat/completions to the baseUrl. \\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"d5cd1305-7adf-45ee-8197-124138fe6c01\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"e87f869b-e55e-4468-959f-286b97a975e7\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-05T08:31:47.223Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"以下是整理後的結論與相關程式碼位置。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 1. Azure 相關程式碼與 URL 建構\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/commands/onboard-custom.ts&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;isAzureUrl&#96;**（僅辨識官方 Azure 網域）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;34:42:src/commands/onboard-custom.ts\\\\nfunction isAzureUrl(baseUrl: string): boolean {\\\\n  try {\\\\n    const url = new URL(baseUrl);\\\\n    const host = url.hostname.toLowerCase();\\\\n    return host.endsWith(\\\\\\\".services.ai.azure.com\\\\\\\") || host.endsWith(\\\\\\\".openai.azure.com\\\\\\\");\\\\n  } catch {\\\\n    return false;\\\\n  }\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;transformAzureUrl&#96;**（在 baseUrl 中加入 deployment 路徑）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;45:61:src/commands/onboard-custom.ts\\\\n/**\\\\n * Transforms an Azure AI Foundry/OpenAI URL to include the deployment path.\\\\n * Azure requires: https://host/openai/deployments/&lt;model-id&gt;/chat/completions?api-version=2024-xx-xx-preview\\\\n * ...\\\\n */\\\\nfunction transformAzureUrl(baseUrl: string, modelId: string): string {\\\\n  const normalizedUrl = baseUrl.endsWith(\\\\\\\"/\\\\\\\") ? baseUrl.slice(0, -1) : baseUrl;\\\\n  if (normalizedUrl.includes(\\\\\\\"/openai/deployments/\\\\\\\")) {\\\\n    return normalizedUrl;\\\\n  }\\\\n  return &#96;${normalizedUrl}/openai/deployments/${modelId}&#96;;\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;resolveVerificationEndpoint&#96;**（驗證用 endpoint 組裝）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;276:293:src/commands/onboard-custom.ts\\\\nfunction resolveVerificationEndpoint(params: {\\\\n  baseUrl: string;\\\\n  modelId: string;\\\\n  endpointPath: \\\\\\\"chat/completions\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\"messages\\\\\\\";\\\\n}) {\\\\n  const resolvedUrl = isAzureUrl(params.baseUrl)\\\\n    ? transformAzureUrl(params.baseUrl, params.modelId)\\\\n    : params.baseUrl;\\\\n  const endpointUrl = new URL(\\\\n    params.endpointPath,\\\\n    resolvedUrl.endsWith(\\\\\\\"/\\\\\\\") ? resolvedUrl : &#96;${resolvedUrl}/&#96;,\\\\n  );\\\\n  if (isAzureUrl(params.baseUrl)) {\\\\n    endpointUrl.searchParams.set(\\\\\\\"api-version\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"2024-10-21\\\\\\\");\\\\n  }\\\\n  return endpointUrl.href;\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;applyCustomApiConfig&#96;**（寫入 provider 的 baseUrl）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;575:577:src/commands/onboard-custom.ts\\\\n  // Transform Azure URLs to include the deployment path for API calls\\\\n  const resolvedBaseUrl = isAzureUrl(baseUrl) ? transformAzureUrl(baseUrl, modelId) : baseUrl;\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. &#96;api&#96; 欄位與 URL 的關係\\\\n\\\\n&#96;api&#96; 決定使用哪種 adapter，但 **URL 路徑是由 &#96;baseUrl&#96; 決定的**，&#96;api&#96; 本身不直接改 URL。\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;openai-completions&#96;：使用 OpenAI Chat Completions 格式，SDK 會在 &#96;baseUrl&#96; 後接 &#96;/chat/completions&#96;。\\\\n- &#96;openai-responses&#96;：使用 Responses API，路徑不同。\\\\n- &#96;anthropic-messages&#96;：使用 Anthropic Messages，路徑為 &#96;/v1/messages&#96;。\\\\n- &#96;ollama&#96;：使用 Ollama 原生 API，路徑為 &#96;/api/chat&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. &#96;baseUrl&#96; 與 deployment / model ID 的組合\\\\n\\\\n**Model 解析**（&#96;src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.ts&#96;）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;96:104:src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.ts\\\\n    const providerCfg = providers[provider];\\\\n    if (providerCfg || modelId.startsWith(\\\\\\\"mock-\\\\\\\")) {\\\\n      const configuredModel = providerCfg?.models?.find((candidate) =&gt; candidate.id === modelId);\\\\n      const fallbackModel: Model&lt;Api&gt; = normalizeModelCompat({\\\\n        id: modelId,\\\\n        name: modelId,\\\\n        api: providerCfg?.api ?? \\\\\\\"openai-responses\\\\\\\",\\\\n        provider,\\\\n        baseUrl: providerCfg?.baseUrl,\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;baseUrl&#96; 來自 provider 設定，所有該 provider 底下的 model 共用同一個 &#96;baseUrl&#96;。  \\\\n實際 HTTP 請求由 &#96;@mariozechner/pi-ai&#96; 的 &#96;streamSimple&#96; 發出，會把 &#96;baseUrl&#96; 與 endpoint 路徑組合起來。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. 可用的 &#96;api&#96; 類型\\\\n\\\\n&#96;src/config/types.models.ts&#96;：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;3:12:src/config/types.models.ts\\\\nexport const MODEL_APIS = [\\\\n  \\\\\\\"openai-completions\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"openai-responses\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"openai-codex-responses\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"anthropic-messages\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"google-generative-ai\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"github-copilot\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"bedrock-converse-stream\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"ollama\\\\\\\",\\\\n] as const;\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. Azure 路徑 &#96;/openai/deployments/&#96; 出現位置\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;src/commands/onboard-custom.ts&#96;：&#96;transformAzureUrl&#96;、&#96;resolveVerificationEndpoint&#96;、&#96;applyCustomApiConfig&#96;\\\\n- &#96;src/commands/onboard-custom.test.ts&#96;：測試 &#96;/openai/deployments/gpt-4.1/chat/completions&#96;\\\\n- &#96;smg/api-AzureOpenAI.http&#96;：你的 curl 範例\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. 為何你目前的設定會錯\\\\n\\\\n你目前的設定：\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;baseUrl: \\\\\\\"http://10.11.197.97/\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n- &#96;api: \\\\\\\"openai-completions\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;http://10.11.197.97/&#96; 不會被 &#96;isAzureUrl&#96; 辨識（只認 &#96;.openai.azure.com&#96; 和 &#96;.services.ai.azure.com&#96;），所以：\\\\n\\\\n- onboarding 不會套用 &#96;transformAzureUrl&#96;\\\\n- provider 的 &#96;baseUrl&#96; 會維持 &#96;http://10.11.197.97/&#96;\\\\n- SDK 會組出類似 &#96;http://10.11.197.97/v1/chat/completions&#96; 或 &#96;http://10.11.197.97/chat/completions&#96;，而不是 Azure 的 deployment 路徑。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. 正確的設定方式\\\\n\\\\n目標 URL：&#96;http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2/chat/completions&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;baseUrl&#96; 必須包含 deployment 路徑，讓 SDK 在後面接 &#96;/chat/completions&#96; 時剛好得到正確 URL。因此應設為：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\n\\\\\\\"baseUrl\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2\\\\\\\"\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n完整 provider 範例：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\n\\\\\\\"azure\\\\\\\": {\\\\n  \\\\\\\"baseUrl\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"apiKey\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"d4922a22-488f-07a6-dc68-00b7de42ce67\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"api\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"openai-completions\\\\\\\",\\\\n  \\\\\\\"authHeader\\\\\\\": false,\\\\n  \\\\\\\"headers\\\\\\\": { \\\\\\\"api-key\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"d4922a22-488f-07a6-dc68-00b7de42ce67\\\\\\\" },\\\\n  \\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\": [\\\\n    {\\\\n      \\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"gpt-5.2\\\\\\\",\\\\n      \\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"gpt-5.2\\\\\\\",\\\\n      ...\\\\n    }\\\\n  ]\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n若有多個 deployment（例如 &#96;gpt-5.2&#96;、&#96;gpt-4.1&#96;），因為 provider 的 &#96;baseUrl&#96; 是共用的，需要：\\\\n\\\\n- 為每個 deployment 建立一個 provider，各自設定對應的 &#96;baseUrl&#96;，例如：\\\\n  - &#96;azure-gpt52&#96;: &#96;baseUrl: \\\\\\\"http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n  - &#96;azure-gpt41&#96;: &#96;baseUrl: \\\\\\\"http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-4.1\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 8. Azure 認證與 &#96;api-version&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;onboard-custom.ts&#96; 中，當 &#96;isAzureUrl&#96; 為 true 時會：\\\\n\\\\n- 使用 &#96;api-key&#96; header（而非 &#96;Authorization: Bearer&#96;）\\\\n- 加上 &#96;api-version=2024-10-21&#96; query parameter\\\\n\\\\n你的自訂 host &#96;10.11.197.97&#96; 不會觸發這段邏輯，所以：\\\\n\\\\n- 若 proxy 需要 &#96;api-key&#96; header，你已經在 &#96;headers&#96; 裡設了，沒問題。\\\\n- 若 proxy 需要 &#96;api-version&#96;，需在 &#96;baseUrl&#96; 加上 query，例如：  \\\\n  &#96;\\\\\\\"baseUrl\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2?api-version=2024-10-21\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1772623845699,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Azure           {
```json
            "text": "export function createOllamaStreamFn(baseUrl: string): StreamFn {",
            "lineNumber": 408,

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410
          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "        const ollamaTools = extractOllamaTools(context.tools);",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Ollama defaults to num_ctx=4096 which is too small for large",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (typeof options?.temperature === \"number\") {",
            "lineNumber": 426
          },

            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "        const body: OllamaChatRequest = {",

          },

          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 437
          },

          },
          {
            "text": "        };",
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "text": "        const headers: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {",
            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {
            "text": "          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "          ...options?.headers,",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {
            "text": "        };",
            "lineNumber": 444
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (options?.apiKey) {",
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455
          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          {
            "text": "function normalizeAnthropicBaseUrl(baseUrl: string): string {",

            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "export function normalizeModelCompat(model: Model&lt;Api&gt;): Model&lt;Api&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const baseUrl = model.baseUrl ?? \"\";",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "  // Normalise anthropic-messages baseUrl: strip trailing /v1 that users may",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  // have included in their config. pi-ai appends /v1/messages itself.",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (normalised !== baseUrl) {",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      return { ...model, baseUrl: normalised } as Model&lt;\"anthropic-messages\"&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  const isZai = model.provider === \"zai\" || baseUrl.includes(\"api.z.ai\");",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "  const isMoonshot =",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "    model.provider === \"moonshot\" ||",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "    baseUrl.includes(\"moonshot.ai\") ||",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    baseUrl.includes(\"moonshot.cn\");",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "  const isDashScope = model.provider === \"dashscope\" || isDashScopeCompatibleEndpoint(baseUrl);",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  if ((!isZai &amp;&amp; !isMoonshot &amp;&amp; !isDashScope) || !isOpenAiCompletionsModel(model)) {",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    return model;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  const openaiModel = model;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  const compat = openaiModel.compat ?? undefined;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (compat?.supportsDeveloperRole === false) {",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    return model;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  openaiModel.compat = compat",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    ? { ...compat, supportsDeveloperRole: false }",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "    : { supportsDeveloperRole: false };",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "  return openaiModel;",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },

            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "isSignature": true
          }

          {
            "text": "export async function runEmbeddedAttempt(",

          {
            "lineNumber": 917
          },

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 939
          },

            "lineNumber": 940
          },

            "lineNumber": 941
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 946
          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\src\\agents\\models-config.providers.ts",

          },

          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": " * Derive the Ollama native API base URL from a configured base URL.",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": " * Users typically configure &#96;baseUrl&#96; with a &#96;/v1&#96; suffix (e.g.",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": " * &#96;http://192.168.20.14:11434/v1&#96;) for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": " * The native Ollama API lives at the root (e.g. &#96;/api/tags&#96;), so we",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": " * strip the &#96;/v1&#96; suffix when present.",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "export function resolveOllamaApiBase(configuredBaseUrl?: string): string {",
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!configuredBaseUrl) {",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "    return OLLAMA_API_BASE_URL;",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Strip trailing slash, then strip /v1 suffix if present",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "  const trimmed = configuredBaseUrl.replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "  return trimmed.replace(/\\/v1$/i, \"\");",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "async function queryOllamaContextWindow(",
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  apiBase: string,",
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  modelName: string,",
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "): Promise&lt;number | undefined&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "async function runPerplexitySearch(params: {",
            "lineNumber": 849,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  query: string;",
            "lineNumber": 850,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  apiKey: string;",
            "lineNumber": 851,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  baseUrl: string;",
            "lineNumber": 852,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  model: string;",
            "lineNumber": 853,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  timeoutSeconds: number;",
            "lineNumber": 854,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  freshness?: string;",
            "lineNumber": 855,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "}): Promise&lt;{ content: string; citations: string[] }&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 856,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const baseUrl = params.baseUrl.trim().replace(/\\/$/, \"\");",
            "lineNumber": 857
          },
          {
            "text": "  const endpoint = &#96;${baseUrl}/chat/completions&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 858
          },
          {
            "text": "  const model = resolvePerplexityRequestModel(baseUrl, params.model);",
            "lineNumber": 859
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 860
          },
          {
            "text": "  const body: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt; = {",
            "lineNumber": 861
          },
          {
            "text": "    model,",
            "lineNumber": 862
          },
          {
            "text": "    messages: [",
            "lineNumber": 863
          },
          {
            "text": "      {",
            "lineNumber": 864
          },
          {
            "text": "        role: \"user\",",
            "lineNumber": 865
          },
          {
            "text": "        content: params.query,",
            "lineNumber": 866
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 867
          },
          {
            "text": "    ],",
            "lineNumber": 868
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 869
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 870
          },
          {
            "text": "  const recencyFilter = freshnessToPerplexityRecency(params.freshness);",
            "lineNumber": 871
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (recencyFilter) {",
            "lineNumber": 872
          },
          {
            "text": "    body.search_recency_filter = recencyFilter;",
            "lineNumber": 873
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 874
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 875
          },
          {
            "text": "  return withTrustedWebSearchEndpoint(",
            "lineNumber": 876
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 877
          },
          {
            "text": "      url: endpoint,",
            "lineNumber": 878
          },
          {
            "text": "      timeoutSeconds: params.timeoutSeconds,",
            "lineNumber": 879
          },
          {
            "text": "      init: {",
            "lineNumber": 880
          },
          {
            "text": "        method: \"POST\",",
            "lineNumber": 881
          },
          {
            "text": "        headers: {",
            "lineNumber": 882
          },
          {
            "text": "          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",",
            "lineNumber": 883
          },
          {
            "text": "          Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${params.apiKey}&#96;,",
            "lineNumber": 884
          },
          {
            "text": "          \"HTTP-Referer\": \"https://openclaw.ai\",",
            "lineNumber": 885
          },
          {
            "text": "          \"X-Title\": \"OpenClaw Web Search\",",
            "lineNumber": 886
          },
          {
            "text": "        },",
            "lineNumber": 887
          },
          {
            "text": "        body: JSON.stringify(body),",
            "lineNumber": 888
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 889
          },
          {
            "text": "    },",
            "lineNumber": 890
          },
          {
            "text": "    async (res) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 891
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!res.ok) {",
            "lineNumber": 892
          },
          {
            "text": "        return await throwWebSearchApiError(res, \"Perplexity\");",
            "lineNumber": 893
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 894
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 895
          },
          {
            "text": "      const data = (await res.json()) as PerplexitySearchResponse;",
            "lineNumber": 896
          },
          {
            "text": "      const content = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? \"No response\";",
            "lineNumber": 897
          },
          {
            "text": "      const citations = data.citations ?? [];",
            "lineNumber": 898
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 899
          },
          {
            "text": "      return { content, citations };",
            "lineNumber": 900
          },
          {
            "text": "    },",
            "lineNumber": 901
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 902
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 903,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 904
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\src\\agents\\model-compat.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 16,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 62,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": " * pi-ai constructs the Anthropic API endpoint as &#96;${baseUrl}/v1/messages&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": " * If a user configures &#96;baseUrl&#96; with a trailing &#96;/v1&#96; (e.g. the previously",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": " * recommended format \"https://api.anthropic.com/v1\"), the resulting URL",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": " * becomes \"…/v1/v1/messages\" which the Anthropic API rejects with a 404.",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": " * Strip a single trailing &#96;/v1&#96; (with optional trailing slash) from the",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": " * baseUrl for anthropic-messages models so users with either format work.",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "function normalizeAnthropicBaseUrl(baseUrl: string): string {",
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  return baseUrl.replace(/\\/v1\\/?$/, \"\");",

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "async function buildHuggingfaceProvider(apiKey?: string): Promise&lt;ProviderConfig&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 780,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Resolve env var name to value for discovery (GET /v1/models requires Bearer token).",
            "lineNumber": 781
          },
          {
            "text": "  const resolvedSecret =",
            "lineNumber": 782
          },
          {
            "text": "    apiKey?.trim() !== \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 783
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? /^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$/.test(apiKey!.trim())",
            "lineNumber": 784
          },
          {
            "text": "        ? (process.env[apiKey!.trim()] ?? \"\").trim()",
            "lineNumber": 785
          },
          {
            "text": "        : apiKey!.trim()",
            "lineNumber": 786
          },
          {
            "text": "      : \"\";",
            "lineNumber": 787
          },
          {
            "text": "  const models =",
            "lineNumber": 788
          },
          {
            "text": "    resolvedSecret !== \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 789
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? await discoverHuggingfaceModels(resolvedSecret)",
            "lineNumber": 790
          },
          {
            "text": "      : HUGGINGFACE_MODEL_CATALOG.map(buildHuggingfaceModelDefinition);",
            "lineNumber": 791
          },
          {
            "text": "  return {",
            "lineNumber": 792
          },
          {
            "text": "    baseUrl: HUGGINGFACE_BASE_URL,",
            "lineNumber": 793
          },
          {
            "text": "    api: \"openai-completions\",",
            "lineNumber": 794
          },
          {
            "text": "    models,",
            "lineNumber": 795
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 796
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 797,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 798
          },
          {
            "text": "function buildTogetherProvider(): ProviderConfig {",
            "lineNumber": 799,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  return",
            "lineNumber": 800
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 805,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export function resolveModel(",
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  provider: string,",
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "isSignature": true
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 46,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "): {",
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  model?: Model&lt;Api&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 49,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 50,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 51,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "} {",
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": " modelRegistry };",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "    // OpenRouter is a pass-through proxy — any model ID available on OpenRouter",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    // should work without being pre-registered in the local catalog.",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (normalizedProvider === \"openrouter\") {",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      const fallbackModel: Model&lt;Api&gt; = normalizeModelCompat({",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: modelId,",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "        provider,",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        baseUrl: \"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1\",",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "        reasoning: false,",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "        input: [\"text\"],",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "        cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "        contextWindow: DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS,",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Align with OPENROUTER_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS in models-config.providers.ts",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "        maxTokens: 8192,",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      } as Model&lt;Api&gt;);",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      return { model: fallbackModel, authStorage, modelRegistry };",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    const providerCfg = providers[provider];",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (providerCfg || modelId.startsWith(\"mock-\")) {",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      const configuredModel = providerCfg?.models?.find((candidate) =&gt; candidate.id === modelId);",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "      const fallbackModel: Model&lt;Api&gt; = normalizeModelCompat({",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: modelId,",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "        name: modelId,",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "        provider,",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "        baseUrl: providerCfg?.baseUrl,",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "        reasoning: configuredModel?.reasoning ?? false,",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "        input: [\"text\"],",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "        cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        contextWindow:",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "          configuredModel?.contextWindow ??",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "          providerCfg?.models?.[0]?.contextWindow ??",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "          DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS,",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "      } as Model&lt;Api&gt;);",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "      return { model: fallbackModel, authStorage, modelRegistry };",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 127,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": " * Build a more helpful error when the model is not found.",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": " * Local providers (ollama, vllm) need a dummy API key to be registered.",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": " * Users often configure &#96;agents.defaults.model.primary: \"ollama/…\"&#96; but",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": " * forget to set &#96;OLLAMA_API_KEY&#96;, resulting in a confusing \"Unknown model\"",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },

            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 139
          }
        ]
      },

          },
          {
            "text": "  const priorFetch = global.fetch;",

            "lineNumber": 241

            "lineNumber": 242
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246
          },

            "lineNumber": 247

            "lineNumber": 249

          },

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "    expect(body.search_recency_filter).toBe(\"week\");",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "  it.each([",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          {
            "text": "describe(\"normalizeModelCompat — Anthropic baseUrl\", () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  const anthropicBase = (): Model&lt;Api&gt; =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "    ({",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "      id: \"claude-opus-4-6\",",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },

            "text": "      name: \"claude-opus-4-6\",",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "      api: \"anthropic-messages\",",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "      provider: \"anthropic\",",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      reasoning: true,",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "      input: [\"text\"],",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "      cost: { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheWrite: 0 },",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      contextWindow: 200_000,",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "      maxTokens: 8_192,",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    }) as Model&lt;Api&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    const normalized = normalizeModelCompat(model);",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "    expect(normalized.baseUrl).toBe(\"https://api.anthropic.com\");",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "    const model = { ...anthropicBase(), baseUrl: \"https://api.anthropic.com\" };",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "    const normalized = normalizeModelCompat(model);",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },

          },
```

The key insight is that `streamSimple` from `@mariozechner/pi-ai` handles the actual HTTP requests. Let me check how it constructs URLs. Since this is an external library, let me check the node_modules to understand the URL construction.

Actually, looking at this more carefully, I think the `baseUrl` in the model config is passed directly to the `streamSimple` function from `@mariozechner/pi-ai`. That library likely appends `/chat/completions` to the `baseUrl` for OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

The standard OpenAI SDK pattern is:
- `baseUrl` + `/chat/completions` for completions API


- So for an Azure endpoint like `http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2/chat/completions`, I'd need to strip off the `/chat/completions` suffix and use `http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2` as the `baseUrl`. Let me check the pi-ai library to confirm this behavior.</details></think>

```
http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2/chat/completions
```

```
http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2
```

```
http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2/chat/completions
```

The current config has `baseUrl: "http://10.11.197.97/"`, which would produce the wrong endpoint. I need to verify whether `authHeader: false` with a custom `api-key` header is the right approach for Azure authentication, and I should check how the onboard-custom code handles this.

分析完成。以下是問題根因和修正方案：

## 問題分析

**成功的 API 呼叫 URL：**
```
http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2/chat/completions
```

**目前設定的 `baseUrl`：** `http://10.11.197.97/`

SDK（`streamSimple` from `pi-ai`）會在 `baseUrl` 後面附加 `/chat/completions`，所以目前產生的 URL 是：
```
http://10.11.197.97/chat/completions  ← 404！
```

`isAzureUrl()` 只辨識 `.openai.azure.com` 和 `.services.ai.azure.com` 網域，不會對 `10.11.197.97` 這個 IP 做 Azure deployment path 轉換（`transformAzureUrl`），所以 `/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2` 這段路徑永遠不會被自動加入。

## 修正

需要將 `baseUrl` 改為包含完整 deployment 路徑：

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file_v2">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file_v2** • Edit file: d:\_Code\_GitHub\openclaw-260302\smg\openclaw.json</summary>

</details>

</tool-use>

---

確認修改後的完整 provider 設定：

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="read_file_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **read_file_v2** • Read file: d:\_Code\_GitHub\openclaw-260302\smg\openclaw.json</summary>

</details>
</tool-use>

---

修改完成。以下是完整的分析摘要：

---

## 問題摘要

| 項目 | 修改前 | 修改後 |
|---|---|---|
| `baseUrl` | `http://10.11.197.97/` | `http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2` |
| SDK 組合的 URL | `http://10.11.197.97/chat/completions` (404) | `http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2/chat/completions` (200) |

## 根因

1. **`isAzureUrl()`** 只辨識標準 Azure 網域（`.openai.azure.com`、`.services.ai.azure.com`），IP 位址 `10.11.197.97` 不會觸發 `transformAzureUrl()` 自動加上 `/openai/deployments/{model}` 路徑
2. SDK 的 `streamSimple` 直接在 `baseUrl` 後面接 `/chat/completions`，缺少中間的 deployment 路徑就會打到不存在的 endpoint → 404

## 其他設定驗證

- **`api: "openai-completions"`** — 正確，Azure OpenAI 使用 OpenAI-compatible 格式
- **`authHeader: false`** + **`headers: { "api-key": "..." }`** — 正確，Azure 使用 `api-key` header 而非 `Authorization: Bearer`
- **`api-version` query parameter** — 從成功的 curl 來看，此 proxy 不需要

## 注意事項

若之後需要新增其他 Azure deployment（例如 `gpt-4.1`），因為 `baseUrl` 是 provider 層級共用的，每個 deployment 需要建立獨立的 provider entry，例如：

```json
"azure-gpt52": { "baseUrl": "http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2", ... },
"azure-gpt41": { "baseUrl": "http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-4.1", ... }
```

need to understand exactly how the &#96;openai-completions&#96; API adapter in this codebase constructs HTTP requests. Specifically:\\\\n\\\\n1. **URL**: How is the final URL built from &#96;model.baseUrl&#96;? Does it append &#96;/v1/chat/completions&#96; or just &#96;/chat/completions&#96;? Check the &#96;streamSimple&#96; function usage and any URL construction logic in &#96;src/agents/&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n2. **Headers**: When &#96;authHeader: false&#96; is set in the provider config, does the SDK still inject an &#96;Authorization: Bearer &lt;apiKey&gt;&#96; header? How are custom &#96;headers&#96; from the provider config merged? Look at how &#96;apiKey&#96;, &#96;authHeader&#96;, and &#96;headers&#96; fields flow from config to the actual HTTP fetch call.\\\\n\\\\n3. **Request Body**: For &#96;openai-completions&#96;, what fields does the SDK send in the JSON body? Specifically: &#96;model&#96;, &#96;messages&#96;, &#96;stream&#96;, &#96;temperature&#96;, &#96;max_tokens&#96; vs &#96;max_completion_tokens&#96;. Check if &#96;stream&#96; is always &#96;true&#96; (streaming).\\\\n\\\\n4. **apiKey injection**: When &#96;authHeader&#96; is false, is the &#96;apiKey&#96; still sent somewhere (e.g., as a query param or in the body)? Or is it completely suppressed?\\\\n\\\\nSearch in:\\\\n- &#96;src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/&#96; for how model config is passed to stream functions\\\\n- &#96;src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/extra-params.ts&#96; for how headers/options are constructed\\\\n- &#96;src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts&#96; for the actual streaming call setup\\\\n- &#96;src/config/types.models.ts&#96; for the provider config type definitions\\\\n- &#96;src/commands/onboard-custom.ts&#96; for Azure-specific header handling\\\\n\\\\nReturn all relevant code snippets showing header construction, URL construction, and body construction for the &#96;openai-completions&#96; API.\\\"}\",\"eae2de72-4c60-438e-91db-19d76907dc98\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"2514ebd3-23ea-412b-8841-31f348367a13\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-05T08:31:47.261Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromp resolvePiCredentialMapFromStore, type PiCredentialMap } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"./pi-auth-credentials.js\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst PiAuthStorageClass = PiCodingAgent.AuthStorage;\\\\\\\\nconst PiModelRegistryClass = PiCodingAgent.ModelRegistry;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { PiAuthStorageClass as AuthStorage, PiModelRegistryClass as ModelRegistry };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype InMemoryAuthStorageBackendLike = {\\\\\\\\n  withLock&lt;T&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    update: (current: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      result: T;\\\\\\\\n      next?: string;\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n  ): T;\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction createInMemoryAuthStorageBackend(\\\\\\\\n  initialData: PiCredentialMap,\\\\\\\\n): InMemoryAuthStorageBackendLike {\\\\\\\\n  let snapshot = JSON.stringify(initialData, null, 2);\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    withLock&lt;T&gt;(\\\\\\\\n      update: (current: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        result: T;\\\\\\\\n        next?: string;\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n    ): T {\\\\\\\\n      const { result, next } = update(snapshot);\\\\\\\\n      if (typeof next === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"string\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n        snapshot = next;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      return result;\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction isRecord(value: unknown): value is Record&lt;string, unknown&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  return typeof value === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"object\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" &amp;&amp; value !== null &amp;&amp; !Array.isArray(value);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction scrubLegacyStaticAuthJsonEntries(pathname: string): void {\\\\\\\\n  if (process.env.OPENCLAW_AUTH_STORE_READONLY === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!fs.existsSync(pathname)) {\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let parsed: unknown;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    parsed = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(pathname, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")) as unknown;\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!isRecord(parsed)) {\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let changed = false;\\\\\\\\n  for (const [provider, value] of Object.entries(parsed)) {\\\\\\\\n    if (!isRecord(value)) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (value.type !== string;\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\ntype InlineProviderConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  baseUrl?: string;\\\\\\\\n  api?: ModelDefinitionConfig[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"api\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"];\\\\\\\\n  models?: ModelDefinitionConfig[];\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { buildModelAliasLines };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function buildInlineProviderModels(\\\\\\\\n  providers: Record&lt;string, InlineProviderConfig&gt;,\\\\\\\\n): InlineModelEntry[] {\\\\\\\\n  return Object.entries(providers).flatMap(([providerId, entry]) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const trimmed = providerId.trim();\\\\\\\\n    if (!trimmed) {\\\\\\\\n      return [];\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return (entry?.models ?? \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"merge\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction resolvePreferredTokenLimit(explicitValue: number, implicitValue: number): number {\\\\\\\\n  // Keep catalog refresh behavior for stale low values while preserving\\\\\\\\n  // intentional larger user overrides (for example Ollama &gt;128k contexts).\\\\\\\\n  return explicitValue &gt; implicitValue ? explicitValue : implicitValue;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction mergeProviderModels(implicit: ProviderConfig, explicit: ProviderConfig): ProviderConfig {\\\\\\\\n  const implicitModels = Array.isArray(implicit.models) ? implicit.models : [];\\\\\\\\n  const explicitModels = Array.isArray(explicit.models) ? explicit.models : [];\\\\\\\\n  if (implicitModels.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n    return { ...implicit, ...explicit };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const getId = (model: unknown): string =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!model || typeof model !== \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"object\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n      return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const id = (model as { id?: unknown }).id;\\\\\\\\n    return typeof id === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"string\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ? id.trim() : \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  const implicitById = new Map(\\\\\\\\n    implicitModels.map((model) =&gt; [getId(model), model] as const).filter(([id]) =&gt; Boolean(id)),\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const seen = new Set&lt;string&gt;();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const mergedModels = explicitModels.map((explicitModel) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const id = getId(explicitModel);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id) {\\\\\\\\n      return explicitModel;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    seen.add(id);\\\\\\\\n    const implicitModel = implicitById.get(id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!implicitModel) {\\\\\\\\n      return explicitModel;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Refresh capability metadata from the implicit catalog while preserving\\\\\\\\n    // user-specific fields (cost, headers, compat, etc.) on explicit entries.\\\\\\\\n    // reasoning is treated as user-overridable: if the user has explicitly set\\\\\\\\n    // it in their config (key present), honour that value; otherwise fall back\\\\\\\\n    // to the built-in catalog default so new reasoning models work out of the\\\\\\\\n    // box without requiring every user to configure it.\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      ...explicitModel,\\\\\\\\n      input: implicitModel.input,\\\\\\\\n      reasoning: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reasoning\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in explicitModel ? explicitModel.reasoning : implicitModel.reasoning,\\\\\\\\n      contextWindow: resolvePreferredTokenLimit(\\\\\\\\n        explicitModel.contextWindow,\\\\\\\\n        implicitModel.contextWindow,\\\\\\\\n      ),\\\\\\\\n      maxTokens: resolvePreferredTokenLimit(explicitModel.maxTokens, implicitModel.maxTokens),\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (const implicitModel of implicitModels) {\\\\\\\\n    const id = getId(implicitModel);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || seen.has(id)) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    seen.add(id);\\\\\\\\n    mergedModels.push(implicitModel);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    ...implicit,\\\\\\\\n    ...explicit,\\\\\\\\n    models: mergedModels,\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction mergeProviders(params: {\\\\\\\\n  implicit?: Record&lt;string, ProviderConfig&gt; | null;\\\\\\\\n  explicit?: Record&lt;string, ProviderConfig&gt; | null;\\\\\\\\n}): Record&lt;string, ProviderConfig&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const out: Record&lt;string, ProviderConfig&gt; = params.implicit ? { ...params.implicit } : {};\\\\\\\\n  for (const [key, explicit] of Object.entries(params.explicit ?? {})) {\\\\\\\\n    const providerKey = key.trim();\\\\\\\\n    if (!providerKey) {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const implicit = out[providerKey];\\\\\\\\n    out[providerKey] = implicit ? mergeProviderModels(implicit,
